code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()
  if n == 0
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut cur_max = 0
    mut first = true
    mut result = ""
    while i < n
      let s_opt = parts.get(i)
      let s = match s_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        "0"
      end
      let val_opt = string.parse_int(s)
      let val = match val_opt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if first
        cur_max = val
        first = false
      else
        if val > cur_max
          cur_max = val
        end
      end
      if i == 0
        result = "#{cur_max}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{cur_max}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
    Ok(())
  end
end
